description: You are a procurement analyst. Build a supplier performance report in Power BI Desktop using 'Suppliers.csv', 'Products.csv', and 'Order_Details.csv' located in 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\PowerBITasks\'. Configure the data model with relationships between Suppliers[SupplierID] and Products[SupplierID], and Products[ProductID] and Order_Details[ProductID]. Create a measure named 'Total_Order_Value' that calculates the sum of (UnitPrice * Quantity * (1 - Discount)). On a report page named 'Supplier Performance', include a Treemap visual showing 'Total_Order_Value' by 'Country' and 'CompanyName', and a Table visual showing 'CompanyName', 'Country', and 'Total_Order_Value'. Save the final report to 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Supplier_Performance.pbix'.
